steps.name: I launch the TyMe application
the application opens successfully and allows a notification
I skipped a splash screen
lands on login page and I enter email address "kirthiga.g+not1@spritle.com"
I enter password "Password@123"
I tap on the Sign In button
I enter otp as "123456"
I tap on the Verify button
I land on the dashboard
I tap on My accounts icon from bottom navigation bar

steps.name: I land on My account page
I tap on My profile option
I land on the edit profile page
I change the First Name as "Kirthiga"
I change the Last Name as "QA"
I updated the gender
I tap on Date of birth field
the calendar picker opens
I choose the date "15" May "2001" and confirms the date
I upload image from gallery
I update the state as "California"
I update the city as "Los Angeles"
I update the zipcode as "90001"
I tap on Update button
